<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox collectable
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
<% if (it.count) { -%>
|count=<%= it.count %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasPunchText) { -%>
|punch_text=<%~ it.punchText %>
<% } -%>
}}<section end="infobox" />
<% if (it.hasRewardsSection) { %>
<section begin="rewards" />
<%~ it.rewardsSection -%>
<section end="rewards" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Collectables]]
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated collectable source pages]]
